name: ai-chat
title: AI Chat
author: Parable
description: A presentational AI-chat block: a scrollable user/assistant transcript with avatars and timestamps, an animated typing-dots indicator, and an auto-growing composer that streams a canned reply in character-chunks (Enter sends, Shift+Enter newline). Respects prefers-reduced-motion by dropping the dot bounce and caret and appending replies whole with no character stream.

inspiredBy.name: Cult Pro — AI chat interfaces (pattern, UI only)
